based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/external/pytorch.adam.multi-step.golden.jsonl. v0.9.1 Adam multi-step adversarial plate.

mutation.explanation: Multi-step Adam requires every parameter's state to chain forward unbroken: receipts[k+1].updates[u].optimizer.state_before == receipts[k].updates[u].optimizer.state_after. Mutating step 1's state_before to step 0's state_before (instead of step 0's state_after) breaks the chain. Rule 25 catches the discrepancy.

reconciliation_check_targeted_first: Rule 25: Optimizer-state chain broken — receipts[1].state_before does not match receipts[0].state_after for the same parameter.
purpose: v0.9.1 Adam multi-step anti-circularity fixture (kind: 'stale-moment-state'). Pressure-tests that the named multi-step rule fires BEFORE the reconciler consults fixture_status metadata.
v0_9_1_trust_framing: Adam multi-step rules 25 (state chain) + 26 (config constancy) are STRUCTURAL consistency checks. Producer-authenticity caveat per Rule 17 / Fang et al. 2023 applies.
